description_long: This is a modern red Audi Q2 hatchback car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a prominent black grille featuring the Audi logo. The car has four passenger doors and a rear hatch door, with silver alloy wheels and black trim around the windows and roof. The headlights are angular and LED, while the taillights are compact and wrap around the rear corners. The roof features a black panoramic sunroof, and the side mirrors are color-matched with integrated turn signals. The interior appears to be dark, likely with leather or fabric seats, and the dashboard is equipped with advanced controls and displays.
description: A red Audi Q2 hatchback with a black grille, silver alloy wheels, and a panoramic sunroof. It features four doors and a rear hatch, with modern LED lights and sleek styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black Audi grille, LED headlights, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, alloy wheels, and streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Audi logo, rear hatch door, taillights, and license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and side mirrors.
